title: Author gemini-session-schemas v0.1.0 — family does not exist yet
description: Gemini hosts twin agents (castor + pollux) but has no published session schema family. Other harness session shapes exist (claude-session-schemas v0.1.0 for hulk, codex-session-schemas v0.2.0 for codex, pi-session-schemas v0.1.0 for pi/apple-pi). Author gemini-session-schemas v0.1.0 at schema-universal/private/universal/domain/ai/schema-families/gemini-session-schemas/v0.1.0/spm/gemini-session-schemas-v000-001-000/. Define the canonical session shape: probably GeminiTurnPacket, GeminiContentBlockModel (text/image/thinking variants), GeminiSessionState (handling castor/pollux twin context), and a session-mirror model for the OpenClaw-compatible runtime mirror. Mirror pi-session-schemas' shape as the starting template since both are conversation-shaped session families; codex-session-schemas can also inform.
